text:
- **Models.swift** — Domain model (`Exercise`, `SetTarget`, `WorkoutBlock`/`BlockKind` for straight-sets vs. superset/circuit groups, `Effort`, `SessionSummary`) plus `MockWorkout` with the exact bench/superset-A/circuit data and the `flatten()` function that expands blocks into a flat `[WorkoutStep]` (22 steps total, with rest pages inserted between rounds but never after the final round, matching the spec's `A1,A2,rest,A1,A2,rest,A1,A2` pattern).
- **Theme.swift** — `MoodKey` → gradient/glow color mapping per movement, and `BackgroundView`, the full-bleed background that `.ignoresSafeArea()` so it bleeds under the Dynamic Island and under the floating bottom bar. [...] - **StepPageView.swift** — single-set page: overline, mini-map (`MiniMapRow`, horizontal-scrollable, current movement marked with `play.fill`), exercise name/set count, hero target text, and the coach cue as a quiet glass pill (`quote.bubble` icon). Hero numbers use `@ScaledMetric` so the large custom sizes still respond to Dynamic Type. Rest pages get their own big countdown treatment.
- **ControlsView.swift** — bottom glass cluster: `GlassEffectContainer`-wrapped Easy/Moderate/Hard `EffortPill`s (each paired with an SF Symbols gauge glyph, 44pt min height), an optional subtle reps `+`/`-` nudge (44×44 tap targets), and a second `GlassEffectContainer` with Note (`square.and.pencil`), Skip (`forward.end.fill`), and the primary `.glassProminent` Log & Next / Finish button with a `.symbolEffect(.bounce)` checkmark. Haptics fire exactly as specified: `.selection()` on effort pick, `.impact(.medium)` on Log & Next. Accessibility labels/values are set on all interactive controls and the mini-map.
